2136080.name: BACKROOMS
2136080.description:
BACKROOMS provides a fresh and thrilling take on the familiar urban legend, offering a gripping story that masterfully combines a classic legend with rich lore. Intense first-person action, hyper-realistic environments, and rewarding mind-bending puzzles unite for an unparalleled liminal horror experience.

Main Features



  • Classic Survival Horror Redefined for a New Generation
Inventory and resource management is key to your survival. Iconic gameplay is expanded upon with a new sanity system, and challenged by a variety of AI - all with unique abilities, creating a unique adaptable experience with intense uncertainty.

  • Combined Linear and Randomized Design
Procedural randomization uncaps the scale of the Backrooms - allowing for infinite exploration. This is married with linear pre-built segments, guarantying consistently challenging progression and endless replayability.

  • Non-Euclidean Spaces and Puzzles
In the Backrooms, nothing is as it seems. Keep your wits about you and think outside the box to traverse the liminal dreamscape and solve visual puzzles.

  • Story-driven to the Core
Aside from adrenaline fueled gameplay, BACKROOMS is set apart by its narrative. Follow Grayson as he willingly dives into the Backrooms to investigates the disappearance of his fiancé and the shady inner workings of the mysterious Liminal Anomaly Center in a feature-length story based on a classic myth.

  • Something for Every Backrooms Fanatic
Prefer the Purist, singular Level 0 approach to Backrooms lore? Or the Traditional Three? Got you covered. Several Gamemodes are included to allow for a tailored experience or additional challenge separate from the campaign.
